stemHtml: An aircraft is cruising at FL330 when a TCAS RA is triggered that indicates a climb command. After successfully following the TCAS RA command the aircraft reaches FL350. What is the correct course of action after resolving the TCAS RA?

options.c: Descent to FL320 (1 000 ft below the initial flight level).
options.d: Descent to FL340 (1 000 ft above the initial flight level).
